headline: The Top 5 Analyst Questions From Marriott’s Q1 Earnings Call
summary: Marriott’s first quarter results were shaped by steady global demand, particularly in the U.S. and Canada, and a broad-based recovery across its hotel segments. Management highlighted strong momentum in both leisure and group bookings, with select service hotels seeing a marked rebound after previous softness. CEO Anthony Capuano emphasized that “continued strength in luxury and a meaningful improvement in select service RevPAR” drove performance, while international markets like Greater China a
